particulars.description: All that freehold land known as phase 4, land associated with the wain house, church stoke, montgomery being part of the land registered at hm land registry under title number CYM17095 shown edged red on the attached plan and more particularly described in a transfer dated [ ] 2024 and made between (1) morton david john powell and amanda louise powell and jfp carpentry limited and (2) abbey construction shropshire limited.

All that freehold land known as phase 3, land associated with the wain house, church stoke, montgomery being part of the land registered at hm land registry under title number CYM17095 shown edged red on the attached plan and more particularly described in a transfer dated 18 may 2023 and made between (1) morton david john powell and amanda louise powell and jfp carpentry limited and (2) abbey construction shropshire limited.

All that freehold land known as phase 2, land associated with the wain house, church stoke, montgomery being part of the land registered at hm land registry under title number CYM17095 shown edged red on the attached plan and more. Particularly described in a transfer dated 16 march 2022 and made between (1) morton david john powell and amanda louise powell and jfp carpentry limited and (2) abbey construction shropshire limited.

All that freehold land known as land at the old hatchery/orchard close, churchstoke, powys, SY15 6JR being part of the land registered at H.M. land registry under title number CYM88911 and other properties. See instrument for more details.

All other freehold and leasehold property now or in the future belonging to the company together with all buildings, trade and other fixtures, fixed plant and machinery of the company from time to time on such property and;. All patents, copyrights, marks, service marks, designs and other intellectual property rights (including without limitation business names, know-how, formulae, inventions, confidential information, trade secrets, computer software, programs and systems), claims and all fees, royalties and other rights of every kind deriving from such intellectual property now or in the future belonging to the company.
